programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: After learning that a stranger has been accidentally killed near their rural homes, four Oregon boys decide to go see the body. On the way, Gordie Lachance (Wil Wheaton), Vern Tessio (Jerry O'Connell), Chris Chambers (River Phoenix) and Teddy Duchamp (Corey Feldman) encounter a mean junk man and a marsh full of leeches, as they also learn more about one another and their very different home lives.

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. Posing as a mall Santa and his elf, they rip off shopping outlets on Christmas Eve. This year, however, Willie is falling apart. He's depressed and alcoholic, and his erratic behavior draws the suspicion of mall security (Bernie Mac). But when befriending a sma

programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) teams up with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. Along for the ride is chubby and cheery Thurman Merman, a 250-pound ray of sunshine who brings out Willie's sliver of humanity. Mommy issues arise when the pair are joined by Willie's horror story of a mother, Sunny Soke, who

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: The world's top protection agent is called upon to guard the life of his mortal enemy, one of the world's most notorious hit men. The relentless bodyguard and manipulative assassin have been on the opposite end of the bullet for years and are thrown together for a wildly outrageous 24 hours. During their journey from England to the Hague, they encounter high-speed car chases, outlandish boat escap

programme.title: The Hitman's Wife's Bodyguard
programme.desc: Bodyguard Michael Bryce and hitman Darius Kincaid are back for another life-threatening mission; still unlicensed and under scrutiny, Bryce is forced into action by Darius's even more volatile wife; soon, all three are in over their heads when a madman's sinister plot threatens to leave Europe in total chaos.

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway at a remote cabin turns to chaos when it's revealed that one of the guests -- a subservient android built for human companionship -- has gone haywire.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novitiate on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate. Together, they uncover the order's unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

programme.title: The Nun II
programme.desc: An evil spreads in 1956 France as a priest is murdered, and Sister Irene once again comes face-to-face with the demonic nun Valak.

programme.title: On Becoming a Guinea Fowl
programme.desc: On an empty road in the middle of the night, Shula stumbles across the body of her uncle. As the funeral unfolds, the cousins unveil the buried secrets of their Zambian family in a vibrant reckoning with the lies we tell ourselves.

programme.title: Body at Brighton Rock
programme.desc: Wendy, a part-time summer employee at a mountainous state park, takes on a rough trail assignment at the end of the season, trying to prove to her friends that she's capable enough to do the job. When she takes a wrong turn and ends up deep in the backcountry, she stumbles upon what might be a potential crime scene. Stuck with no communication after losing her radio and with orders to guard the si

programme.title: Hail Satan?
programme.desc: Lucien Greaves co-founds the Satanic Temple, a religious movement that calls for a revolution to save the nation's soul.

programme.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer
programme.desc: Dr. Steven Murphy is a renowned cardiovascular surgeon who presides over a spotless household with his wife and two children. Lurking at the margins of his idyllic suburban existence is Martin, a fatherless teen who insinuates himself into the doctor's life in gradually unsettling ways. Soon, the full scope of Martin's intent becomes menacingly clear when he confronts Steven with a long-forgotten

programme.title: Disobedience
programme.desc: New York photographer Ronit Krushka flies to London after learning about the death of her estranged father. Ronit is returning to the same Orthodox Jewish community that shunned her decades earlier for her childhood attraction to Esti, a female friend. Their fortuitous and happy reunion soon reignites their burning passion as the two women explore boundaries of faith and sexuality.

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

programme.title: My Soul to Take
programme.desc: In the small town of Riverton, a local legend tells of a serial killer's oath to come back and kill the seven children who were born on the night he supposedly died. Now 16 years later, Riverton residents are disappearing again, making some wonder if the legend is true. Bug (Max Thieriot), plagued by nightmares all his life, is one of the so-called Riverton Seven, and it's up to him to save his fr

programme.title: Birds of Prey (and the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn)
programme.desc: It's open season on Harley Quinn when her explosive breakup with the Joker puts a big fat target on her back. Unprotected and on the run, Quinn faces the wrath of narcissistic crime boss Black Mask, his right-hand man, Victor Zsasz, and every other thug in the city. But things soon even out for Harley when she becomes unexpected allies with three deadly women -- Huntress, Black Canary and Renee Mo

programme.title: Super Troopers 2
programme.desc: Fired for their previous shenanigans, former Vermont Highway Patrol officers Thorny, Farva, Rabbit, Foster and Mac get a shot at redemption from Capt. O'Hagan and Gov. Jessan. The wacky quintet must provide law enforcement for a French Canadian town that's transitioning to U.S. sovereignty. Their unconventional methods soon get put to the test when they encounter a smarmy mayor, mischievous Mounti

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. programme.title: Just Friends
programme.desc: High school student Chris Brander (Ryan Reynolds) loves his best friend, Jamie Palamino (Amy Smart). He finally confesses his feelings, but she tells him that she just wants to be friends, and he leaves town in shame. Ten years later, Chris is a successful record executive and involved with self-absorbed pop star Samantha James (Anna Faris). He still pines for Jamie, though, and when his plans to

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Trance
programme.desc: Simon (James McAvoy), a fine-art auctioneer, joins a gang of thieves led by Franck (Vincent Cassel) to steal a priceless Goya painting. During the heist Simon suffers a head injury and awakes with no memory of where he hid the artwork. When torture and physical threats fail to break through his amnesia, Franck hires a hypnotherapist named Elizabeth (Rosario Dawson) to find the answer. But as Eliza

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her n

programme.title: Walk the Line
programme.desc: The rise of country music legend Johnny Cash (Joaquin Phoenix) begins with his days as a boy growing up on the family farm, where he struggles under the scorn of his father (Robert Patrick). As the years pass, Cash ends up in Memphis, Tenn., with his wife, Vivian (Ginnifer Goodwin), and breaks into the music scene after finding his trademark sound. While on tour, Cash meets the love of his life, s

programme.title: They All Laughed
programme.desc: The employees of New York City's Odyssey Detective Agency can't seem to prevent themselves from getting over-involved in their clients' lives. When aging gumshoe John Russo (Ben Gazzara) is assigned to trail an Italian millionaire's wife, Angela (Audrey Hepburn), he inevitably falls for her continental charm. programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: When Beth Emhoff returns to Minnesota from a Hong Kong business trip, she attributes the malaise she feels to jet lag. However, two days later, Beth is dead, and doctors tell her shocked husband that they have no idea what killed her. programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Aspiring country singer Patsy Cline (Jessica Lange) is resigned to both her thankless gigs and her unhappy marriage, until she meets the charismatic Charlie Dick (Ed Harris). Eventually leaving her husband to marry Charlie, Patsy temporarily shelves her performing career to be a mother. Later she returns to singing and finds success under manager Randy Hughes (David Clennon). Patsy hits a remarkab

programme.title: Final Destination
programme.desc: Alex Browning is embarking on a trip to Paris. He experiences a premonition -- he sees the plane explode moments after leaving the ground. Insisting that everyone get off the plane, Alex and seven other people are forced to disembark. All watch as the plane actually explodes in a fireball. He and the other survivors have briefly cheated death, but will not be able to evade their fate for very long

programme.title: For All Mankind
programme.desc: Directed by Al Reinert and with music scored by Brian Eno, "For All Mankind" provides a testament to NASA's Apollo program of the 1960s and '70s. programme.title: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk With Me

Hummel (Ed Harris) from launching chemical weapons on Alcatraz Island into San Francisco. Gen. programme.desc: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. programme.title: Night on Earth

programme.title: Repo Men

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Texas border patrolmen (Kris Kristofferson, Treat Williams) find a jeep, a skeleton and $800,000 in cash dating from 1963.

programme.desc: After Mina's Indian family is ousted from their home in Uganda by dictator Idi Amin, they relocate to Mississippi to start a new life. programme.title: We Live in Time
programme.desc: A surprise encounter brings together a couple, changing the course of their lives. Challenged by the limits of time, they learn to cherish each moment of their decade-spanning and movingly rare love story.

programme.title: Queer
programme.desc: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love.

programme.title: The Art of Getting By
programme.desc: George (Freddie Highmore) is a senior at a posh Manhattan prep school, but his disaffected attitude leaves little room for toeing the line. He'd rather doodle and read philosophy, and he strenuously avoids his parents (Rita Wilson, Sam Robards) whenever possible. Unfortunately, George's attitude is endangering his chances of graduating. Then he meets Sally (Emma Roberts). George finds himself fall

programme.title: The Man
programme.desc: Seeking the gunrunners who killed his partner, undercover cop Derrick Vann (Samuel L. Jackson) sets up a sting. He arranges to meet an arms dealer at a diner, where he'll be the only one reading USA Today. But dentist Andy Fiddler (Eugene Levy), who's in Detroit for a conference, is there reading the same paper, and the dealer mistakes him for Vann and sets up the deal. When Vann realizes this, he

programme.title: Kiss of the Spider Woman
programme.desc: In a prison cell somewhere in Latin America, two very different men warily confront each other. Molina (William Hurt) is first seen wrapping his head in a towel, in the shape of a turban, while Valentin (Raul Julia), bearded and classically macho in appearance, watches with a mixture of fascination and revulsion. During the time spent together, the two men come to understand and respect each other

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Anyone who makes it out alive will get answers to the questions that the Gladers have been asking since they arrived in the maze.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: In the 1950s, notorious New York crime bosses Frank Costello and Vito Genovese vie for control of the city streets. Once the best of friends, petty jealousies and a series of betrayals place them on a deadly collision course that reshapes organized crime forever.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After ratting out his Mafia cohorts, Giovanni Manzoni (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a French town. Despite the best efforts of their handler (Tommy Lee Jones) to keep them in line, Giovanni (now called Fred Blake), his wife (Michelle Pfeiffer) and children (Dianna Agron, John D'Leo) can't help but resort to doing things the "family" way. Howev

programme.title: The Watch
programme.desc: In Glenview, Ohio, four pals, Evan, Bob, Franklin and Jamarcus, form a neighborhood watch group. Armed with flashlights, walkie-talkies and spiffy new jackets, the guys try to take their mission seriously, even if they spend a little time goofing off now and then. But when they discover aliens living among them and no one believes their story, they learn that they have to kick things up a notch to

programme.title: Opus
programme.desc: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: Former cop Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) sees a chance at redemption for past sins when New York City's Mayor Nicolas Hostetler (Russell Crowe) calls on him for a special job. Hostetler thinks his wife, Cathleen (Catherine Zeta-Jones), is having an affair and that it may hurt his chances for re-election. However, a bigger scandal than expected pulls in Billy right at the start of his investigation

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.

programme.title: The Post
programme.desc: Katharine Graham is the first female publisher of a major American newspaper -- The Washington Post. With help from editor Ben Bradlee, Graham races to catch up with The New York Times to expose a massive cover-up of government secrets that spans three decades and four U.S. presidents. Together, they must overcome their differences as they risk their careers -- and very freedom -- to help bring lo

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Some British retirees (Judi Dench, Maggie Smith, Bill Nighy) decide to outsource their retirement to exotic -- and less expensive -- India. programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers

Wilbur), who is targeting Tommy Doyle (Paul Stephen Rudd), a young man tied into the legacy of the killer and his connections with the Strode family. programme.title: Halloween H20: 20 Years Later
programme.desc: Two decades after surviving a massacre on October 31, 1978, former babysitter Laurie Strode finds herself hunted by persistent knife-wielder Michael Myers. Laurie now lives in Northern California under an assumed name, where she works as the headmistress of a private school. But it's not far enough to escape Myers, who soon discovers her whereabouts. programme.title: Halloween: Resurrection
programme.desc: He's back for more... When a group of teens wins a contest to spend a night in Michael Myers' childhood home to be broadcast live on the Internet, they believe they are in for a little fun and some free publicity. But things go frightfully wrong and the game turns into a struggle to make it out of the house alive.

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Caesar (Andy Serkis) and his apes are forced into a deadly conflict with an army of humans led by a ruthless colonel (Woody Harrelson). After the apes suffer unimaginable losses, Caesar wrestles with his darker instincts and begins his own mythic quest to avenge his kind. programme.title: Parental Guidance

It promises to be a fun time for all, until the three young ones turn out to be quite a handful for this o

programme.title: Rodan
programme.desc: A bug-eating pterodactyl flies out of a coal mine and wrecks Japan with sonic booms.

programme.title: Son of Godzilla
programme.desc: In this Japanese monster movie, the massive Godzilla comes to the aid of his newborn son, who hatches from an egg on a remote island where scientists are conducting experiments with radioactivity. Revealing a surprising paternal streak, Godzilla tries to teach his much smaller progeny how to use his powers. The father/son team must then battle giant insects, including praying mantises and a formid

programme.title: Blood Simple
programme.desc: "Blood Simple" was the first feature film from Joel and Ethan Coen. This is the newly restored and re-edited director's cut of the film, introduced by Mortimer Young. The stylish crime thriller premiered at film festivals in 1984. programme.title: Collision Course
programme.desc: Detroit crime boss Madras hires men to smuggle a top secret, Japanese-made turbocharger into the U.S. But Madras' crooks are murdered, and the turbocharger goes missing. As he searches for the stolen engine, so does straitlaced Tokyo detective Fujitsuka Natsuo. programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga: Chapter 1
programme.desc: In 1859 families discover the lure of the Old West as they settle in territories from Wyoming to Kansas. Meanwhile, a gruff cowboy soon finds himself on the run with a prostitute and a young boy after killing a fellow gunman.

programme.title: Patti Cake$
programme.desc: Fed up with life in her New Jersey hometown, Patricia Dombrowski, aka Patti Cake$, hopes to follow in the footsteps of her idol and hit the road to achieve stardom as a rapper. With help from her best friend, a mysterious musician and her loving grandmother, Patti leads the charge against an army of haters, unpaid bills and the broken dreams that are holding her back.

programme.title: My Soul to Take
programme.desc: In the small town of Riverton, a local legend tells of a serial killer's oath to come back and kill the seven children who were born on the night he supposedly died. programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: John Form thinks he's found the perfect gift for his expectant wife, Mia: a vintage doll in a beautiful white dress. However, the couple's delight doesn't last long: One terrible night, devil worshipers invade their home and launch a violent attack against the couple. When the cultists try to summon a demon, they smear a bloody rune on the nursery wall and drip blood on Mia's doll, thereby turning

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: Former toy maker Sam Mullins and his wife, Esther, are happy to welcome a nun and six orphaned girls into their California farmhouse. Years earlier, the couple's 7-year-old daughter Annabelle died in a tragic car accident. Terror soon strikes when one child sneaks into a forbidden room and finds a seemingly innocent doll that appears to have a life of its own.

programme.title: Annabelle Comes Home
programme.desc: Determined to keep Annabelle from wreaking more havoc, paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren lock the possessed doll in the artifacts room in their house. But when the doll awakens the room's evil spirits, it soon becomes an unholy night of terror for the couple's 10-year-old daughter, her friends and their young baby sitter.

programme.title: The Front Room
programme.desc: Everything goes to hell for newly pregnant Belinda after her mother-in-law moves in. As the diabolical guest tries to get her claws on the child, Belinda must draw the line somewhere.

programme.title: Abraham Lincoln: Vampire Hunter
programme.desc: While still a boy, Abraham Lincoln loses his mother to a vampire's bite. He vows revenge, but fails in the attempt, narrowly escaping with his life. He is rescued by Henry (Dominic Cooper), a charismatic vampire hunter who instructs Abe in the fine art of dispatching bloodsuckers. Abe (Benjamin Walker) continues his fight against the undead well into adulthood and his presidency, making a last sta

programme.title: Godzilla Raids Again
programme.desc: Prehistoric monsters Godzilla and Anguirus battle it out in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: Comedy. Ben (Jimmy Fallon) must choose between his two loves: Lindsey (Drew Barrymore) and the Boston Red Sox baseball team. Based on Nick Hornby's novel Fever Pitch.

programme.title: The Black Shield of Falworth
programme.desc: Medieval action-adventure starring Tony Curtis and Janet Leigh. When a peasant discovers his true lineage, he sets out to woo his noble sweetheart and avenge his father's murder.

programme.title: The Yellow Mountain
programme.desc: Western. Lex Barker and Howard Duff star as prospectors whose friendship is tested when a promising seam of the gold is discovered in a Nevada mountain. With Mala Powers.

programme.title: Anastasia

programme.title: Fisherman's Friends
programme.desc: Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence stars as a woman hired for a summer to make a shy young lad a man before he heads off to college. Will there be any feelings in the end, hard or otherwise.

programme.title: The Black Phone
programme.desc: Horror with Ethan Hawke. Denver 1974 and The Grabber is abducting boys from the street. But he doesn't reckon on two kids with uncanny abilities who refuse to do as they're told.

programme.title: The Pillow Book
programme.desc: Ewan McGregor stars as an English translator who falls for Japanese beauty Nagiko (Vivian Wu) in Peter Greenaway's drama of love, fetish, betrayal and death. Sexual scenes.

programme.title: Sea Wife
programme.desc: Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

programme.title: The 300 Spartans
programme.desc: Historical drama with Ralph Richardson. A retelling of the stand made at Thermopylae in 480 BC by a small Greek force against invasion by an enormous Persian army.

programme.desc: In the 1950s London, plans for a movie version of a smash-hit play come to an abrupt halt after a pivotal member of the crew is murdered. When a world-weary inspector and an eager rookie constable take on the case, they find themselves thrown into a puzzling whodunit within the glamorously sordid world of underground theater, investigating the mysterious homicide at their own peril.

programme.title: Mothering Sunday
programme.desc: With her employers away, a housemaid sneaks off to spend quality time with her secret lover -- a man who's engaged to another woman.

Hays Hodges (Tommy Lee Jones), a comrade-in-arms who owes his life to Childers.

Maxson once dreamed of becoming a professional baseball player, but was deemed too old when the major leagues began admitting black athletes. Bitter over his missed opportunity, Troy creates further tension in his family when he squashes his son's chance to meet a college football recruiter.

programme.desc: Sci-fi action with Jason Statham, who must come face to face with a shark as he helps a research team stuck at the bottom of the Pacific.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors
programme.desc: In a walled city, a troubled youth stumbles upon a chaotic world of crime. Chinese crime thriller with subtitles.

programme.title: Hellboy II: The Golden Army
programme.desc: A demon detective fights to uphold an ancient truce between mankind and the underworld. Fantasy sequel.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge Of The Fallen
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox team up with Optimus Prime again to save the Earth. Violence/flashing images.
Spartan king Gerard Butler leads his brave elite warriors against the all-conquering Persian invaders. Strong violence.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Disaster thriller starring Dwayne Johnson as a security consultant and former FBI agent forced to save the day when the world's "safest" building comes under attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark Of The Moon
programme.desc: Can Shia LaBeouf save the world once more? Third instalment of the hit franchise. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: Spy action thriller with Geena Davis and Samuel L Jackson.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Action-packed superhero film starring Vin Diesel as Ray Garrison, a soldier killed in action and brought back to life as a super-human.

programme.title: Prisoner Of War
programme.desc: A British RAF Wing Commander during World War II is captured and forced to fight in a Japanese internment camp in this action thriller.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors
programme.desc: In a walled city, a troubled youth stumbles upon a chaotic world of crime. Chinese crime thriller with subtitles.

programme.title: Crawl
programme.desc: When her hometown is devastated by a hurricane, a Florida teenager heads back into danger to find her missing father. But rising waters may be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum to bring glory back to Rome. BAFTA-nominated long-awaited sequel to Ridley Scott's historical epic.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie and Venom, now on the run, face dangers from both worlds as the end of their symbiotic relationship grows near. Tom Hardy stars.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark Of The Moon
programme.desc: Can Shia LaBeouf save the world once more? Third instalment of the hit franchise. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: Spy action thriller with Geena Davis and Samuel L Jackson.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince Of Thieves
programme.desc: Kevin Costner is the hero leading a peasant revolt against the evil Sheriff of Nottingham (Alan Rickman). Stirring adventure with Morgan Freeman. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A writer struggling to complete the script for a movie about psychopathic killers turns to his criminal friends for advice. He ends up getting more than he bargained for when the small-time crooks kidnap a dog that belongs to a gangster, putting all their lives in danger. Comedy thriller, starring Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partner's show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklater's biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Roman

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Cute furball Gizmo is reunited with his human friends Billy and Kate, who now work in the New York offices of an eccentric tycoon. However, it is not long before Gizmo has spawned a new generation of murderous carnivores, who quickly overrun the building - and a genetics lab where they produce even more startling mutations. Joe Dante's comedy sequel, starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, John Glov

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: A man makes the mistake of engaging a cable TV installer in conversation in a ploy to get all the channels for free. However, the manic repairman shows an invincible determination to be his new best friend - and does not take kindly to rejection. Comedy directed by Ben Stiller, starring Jim Carrey, Matthew Broderick and George Segal.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Best friends Doug and Griff became obsessed with the film Anaconda when they were children and have always dreamed of remaking their favourite picture. When both men find themselves in the grip of a mid-life crisis, they fast track their film-making ambitions and head into the Amazon jungle with pals Claire and Kenny to shoot their slithering masterpiece. Comedy adventure, starring Jack Black, Pau

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman.

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael O'Keefe and Rodney Dangerfield.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his legendary father, Frank Drebin Jr must save his police department by solving a case. Comedy reboot, starring Liam Neeson, Pamela Anderson and Danny Huston.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack, a struggling musician, gets hit by a bus during a mysterious event. When he regains consciousness, he finds that he is the only person who can remember the Beatles, and sets out to exploit the opportunity by passing their hits off as his own compositions. Danny Boyle's comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Best friends Doug and Griff became obsessed with the film Anaconda when they were children and have always dreamed of remaking their favourite picture. When both men find themselves in the grip of a mid-life crisis, they fast track their film-making ambitions and head into the Amazon jungle with pals Claire and Kenny to shoot their slithering masterpiece. Comedy adventure, starring Jack Black, Pau

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: It's five years since Sophie invited her three possible dads to her wedding, and now most of her family are reunited as she prepares for the grand reopening of the Hotel Bella Donna. Along the way, she learns more about her mother's past. Abba-themed musical sequel, starring Amanda Seyfried, Lily James, Pierce Brosnan, Cher and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: An American counter-terrorism unit travels around the world on the lookout for threats to global peace, causing much destruction to major world cities in the process. The biggest current menace is North Korean leader Kim Jong-il and an organisation much closer to home - the Film Actors Guild. Satirical puppet comedy, voiced by South Park creators Trey Parker and Matt Stone.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill,

programme.title: Jackie Chan's The Tuxedo
programme.desc: A bumbling chauffeur steps in to take the place of a secret agent injured in an explosion. Wearing the agent's hi-tech suit, and with the help of a rookie spy, the humble driver now has all the power he needs to stop a villain from gaining global domination by polluting the world's water supply. Comedy adventure, starring Jackie Chan, Jennifer Love Hewitt, Jason Isaacs and Richie Coster.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Best friends Doug and Griff became obsessed with the film Anaconda when they were children and have always dreamed of remaking their favourite picture. When both men find themselves in the grip of a mid-life crisis, they fast track their film-making ambitions and head into the Amazon jungle with pals Claire and Kenny to shoot their slithering masterpiece. programme.title: All Is True
programme.desc: Kenneth Branagh stars as William Shakespeare, who is forced to return to face the demons of his past in Stratford when the Globe Theatre burns down. With Judi Dench.

programme.title: The End Of The Affair
programme.desc: In World War II London, a writer falls in love with the wife of a British civil servant - but both men suspect her of infidelity with yet another man. Romantic drama.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: Paul Newman is unforgettable as the defiant Deep South chain-gang prisoner whose rebellion makes him a hero with fellow inmates. An Oscar-winning George Kennedy co-stars.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Can baseball coach Brad Pitt and stat man Jonah Hill turn the struggling, cash-strapped Oakland 'A's into a top team? Drama with Philip Seymour Hoffman. Strong language.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Tom Hanks carries this compelling Robinson Crusoe tale as the FedEx troubleshooter struggling to survive after he's marooned on a desert island. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Dreamgirls
programme.desc: A 60s soul trio make it big as backing singers to Eddie Murphy. But fame has a price. Musical with Beyonce and an Oscar-winning Jennifer Hudson. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: New girl Sandy causes a ruckus at Rydell High when stud Danny falls for her. Classic musical with John Travolta and the late Olivia Newton-John.

programme.title: Grease 2
programme.desc: The T-Birds aren't impressed when clean cut new boy Maxwell Caulfield becomes a Cool Rider and makes a play for Pink Lady Michelle Pfeiffer.

programme.title: I, Tonya

programme.title: Joker: Folie A Deux
programme.desc: Joaquin Phoenix returns to his Oscar-winning role, as an incarcerated Arthur Fleck meets his true love: Lady Gaga's Harley Quinn.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Can baseball coach Brad Pitt and stat man Jonah Hill turn the struggling, cash-strapped Oakland 'A's into a top team? Drama with Philip Seymour Hoffman. Strong language.

programme.title: The End Of The Affair
programme.desc: Ralph Fiennes and Julianne Moore star in this intelligent tale of romance amid the rubble of wartime London, based on Graham Greene's book. Contains sex and mature themes.

programme.title: September 5
programme.desc: While broadcasting the 1972 Summer Olympics, an American news crew learns of a hostage crisis in the Olympic Village. Soon, they set out to cover the event live at all cost.

programme.title: I Used To Be Funny
programme.desc: A young stand-up comedian, struggling to recover from a past trauma, battles over whether or not she should join the search for a missing girl she used to nanny.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: When two young men cross paths in Berlin, a simple afternoon in the big city soon takes on a much greater meaning. Heartfelt drama.

programme.title: Turn Me On
programme.desc: A young couple skip doses of a pill that removes human emotion and discover new feelings - but realise that comes with baggage to deal with. Bel Powley stars.

programme.title: Girl You Know It's True
programme.desc: Biographical music drama exploring the notorious scandal involving 80s dancers Robert Pilatus and Fabrice Morvan's rise to fame.

programme.title: Joker: Folie A Deux
programme.desc: Joaquin Phoenix returns to his Oscar-winning role, as an incarcerated Arthur Fleck meets his true love: Lady Gaga's Harley Quinn.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Tonya Harding, a competitive ice skater, rises to fame despite her struggles. However, her career begins to go off the rails when her ex-husband re-enters her life.

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series Of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans dare to outwit their fiendish uncle Count Olaf (Jim Carrey) in an amusingly grim fairytale. With Meryl Streep and Billy Connolly.

programme.title: Yogi Bear
programme.desc: Yogi and Boo-Boo must save Jellystone Park in this live action version of the classic cartoon. Dan Aykroyd and Justin Timberlake voice the misbehaving bears.(78mins).

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: Starry remake of EB White's classic tale. Dakota Fanning is the farmer's daughter who, with the help of smart spider Charlotte, tries to save pig Wilbur from the butcher.

programme.title: Playmobil: The Movie
programme.desc: When her younger brother disappears into the animated world of Playmobil, a woman must abandon her organised life to bring him back. Flashing images.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train.

programme.title: Epic Tails
programme.desc: Life in a beautiful city in ancient Greece takes a turn for a young mouse when she inadvertently helps Jason and his Argonauts on their quest. Animated adventure.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The ninja turtles emerge from the sewers below to protect New York from the villainous Shredder. Hit action fun with Megan Fox.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles are back battling bad guys when Shredder busts out of custody and teams up with Krang.

programme.title: Stuart Little
programme.desc: Charming tale following the adventures of a spirited young mouse adopted by humans Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie. Fun family adventure featuring the voice of Michael J Fox.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: The little mouse with the big heart is back for action and adventure, rescuing his dream chick with Snowbell the cat. Fantastic family fun with Hugh Laurie and Geena Davis.

programme.title: Wicked: For Good
programme.desc: Elphaba, the Wicked Witch of the West, must reunite with Glinda the Good to transform herself - and Oz - for good.

programme.title: Cats & Dogs: The Revenge Of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: With a feline superspy plotting world domination, cats and dogs must put their rivalries aside to defeat her. Family fun. Mild violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The ninja turtles emerge from the sewers below to protect New York from the villainous Shredder. Hit action fun with Megan Fox.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles are back battling bad guys when Shredder busts out of custody and teams up with Krang.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: The cowardly cartoon dog is hungry for adventure with meddling human pals Shaggy and the gang. Spooky fun with Matthew Lillard and Sarah Michelle Gellar. Flashing images.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. team must save Coolsville from all of their past monsters when they are brought back to life by a masked man trying to take down the gang.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series Of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans dare to outwit their fiendish uncle Count Olaf (Jim Carrey) in an amusingly grim fairytale. With Meryl Streep and Billy Connolly.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Comedy starring Gene Wilder as a deaf news-stand owner, who is framed for murder with his blind assistant. Language/mature themes/flashing images/discriminatory content.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Steve Martin stars as a brain surgeon who marries mean gold digger Kathleen Turner before falling for his true love - a brain in a jar. Madcap comedy. Sex/strong language.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Goldie Hawn, Diane Keaton and Bette Midler take revenge on the husbands who dumped them for trophy wives. Girl power comedy with Maggie Smith and Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: When the police force relaxes its recruitment criteria, Steve Guttenberg and Kim Cattrall are among a gaggle of incompetent oddballs who apply to become cops. Goofy comedy.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: The gang stumble through their first task after graduating, battling graffiti artists who have moved into town. Strong language/flashing images.

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Funding is cut and one of the city's academies must close, but which one? Let battle commence! More hijinks with the calamitous cops. Flashing images.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Classic 80s comedy starring Bill Murray and Dan Aykroyd as paranormal experts battling the supernatural. Language/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Ghostbusters 2
programme.desc: A ghostly painting wreaks havoc in New York... who you gonna call? Comedy sequel starring Bill Murray and Dan Aykroyd. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Anxious to get home for the holidays, exec Steve Martin is forced to hit the road with sales oaf John Candy. Classic comic caper. Strong language/flashing images.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Comedy starring Gene Wilder as a deaf news-stand owner, who is framed for murder with his blind assistant. Language/mature themes/flashing images/discriminatory content.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as the animal-loving private eye on the trail of a kidnapped dolphin. Riotous comedy with Courteney Cox and Sean Young. Discriminatory content.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Pet detective Jim Carrey pursues a kidnapped bat through the African jungle. Madcap comedy sequel of rhinos and witch doctors, from the writer of Bruce Almighty.

programme.title: The Man With Two Brains
programme.desc: Steve Martin stars as a brain surgeon who marries mean gold digger Kathleen Turner before falling for his true love - a brain in a jar. Madcap comedy. Sex/strong language.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Mel Brooks' satire about the first black sheriff in an all-white town. Strong language/discriminatory content.

programme.title: Singin' In The Rain
programme.desc: In one of the most acclaimed musicals of all time, silent movie actors Gene Kelly and Jean Hagen make a toe-tapping transition into the new-fangled era of the talkies.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Drunken playboy Dudley Moore stands to lose his inheritance when he falls for waitress Liza Minnelli. John Gielgud won an Oscar as his acid-tongued butler. Strong language.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Mel Brooks' satire about the first black sheriff in an all-white town. Strong language/discriminatory content.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: An American youngster goes to live in China with his mother, where he becomes an outsider and falls foul of the local bullies. He receives help from the kindly school caretaker, who turns out to be a kung fu master and offers to train the boy to defend himself. Martial arts drama, with Jaden Smith and Jackie Chan.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-July 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: Kung fu prodigy Li Fong moves to New York City with his mother and befriends his classmate, Mia. But Connor Day, a local karate champion, provokes Li and publicly humiliates him. Li seeks guidance from his mentor, the kung fu master Mr Han, who reaches out to Daniel LaRusso, convincing the original Karate Kid to teach Li the principles of Miyagi Karate. Drama sequel, starring Jackie Chan, Ben Wang

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A teenager at a new school befriends a pretty girl, but her ex-boyfriend is jealous and attacks him. During one particularly bad fight, a wise old caretaker intervenes and defeats the youngster's assailants using his martial arts skills. He goes on to mentor the boy and teach him karate so he can face his enemies in a tournament. Drama, with Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Elisabeth Shue.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: High-kicking teenager Daniel accompanies his venerable mentor Mr Miyagi when he returns to the Japanese province of Okinawa to visit his dying father. However, an old rival of Miyagi's is waiting for them, while Daniel is drawn into a vicious conflict with their enemy's own karate protege. Martial arts sequel, starring Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita and Yuji Okumoto.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III
programme.desc: The teenage martial arts expert becomes obsessed with defending his championship title, but wise mentor Mr Miyagi is not prepared to help him fight for such a shallow goal. Seeking someone else to help guide his career, he falls under the influence of a crooked trainer - who is secretly plotting his downfall with the help of an old adversary. Adventure sequel, starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Wise karate mentor Mr Miyagi meets the orphaned teenage grand-daughter of a soldier who once saved his life. As well as guiding her through the trials of high school and her first romance, he takes her to a Zen monastery to hone her martial arts skills. Adventure sequel, starring Pat Morita, Hilary Swank, Michael Ironside and Constance Towers.
